tests.assertion: A BP_PRIORITY item with verdict TECHNICAL_PASS and founder_usability_pass false returns technical_pass=true, point_b_complete=false, queue_complete_for_scheduler=false when it is the POINT_B_TARGET mission.
Point B complete requires target mission match, technical pass, founder_usability_pass true, OBJECTIVE_VERDICT founder_usability_pass true, and no stale sync marker.
Scheduler does not contain local logic equivalent to verdict !== TECHNICAL_PASS && verdict !== PASS for queue incompleteness; it imports the shared completion helper.
Never-stop runner does not define local isComplete based only on TECHNICAL_PASS/PASS; it imports the shared completion helper and treats Point B founder false as actionable incomplete work.
Missing commit_sha returns pass=false with code COMMIT_NO_SHA for code-changing build/repair claims.
Commit SHA that is not contained in origin/main returns pass=false with code ORIGIN_MAIN_NOT_UPDATED when remote transport is required.
Deploy SHA mismatch returns pass=false with code DEPLOY_NOT_SYNCED when live runtime proof is required, even if commit and origin/main proof pass.
A founder build job with pass_fail PASS but no transport_proof object is downgraded to FAIL or NOT_LIVE and cannot map to status completed.
technical_acceptance_pass sync set writes acceptance receipt, OBJECTIVE_VERDICT, BP_PRIORITY, and bp_sync proof atomically or returns fail with missing_paths.
Generated PRODUCT_READINESS_REPORT product count equals PRODUCT_REGISTRY active product entries plus salvage entries as defined by registry, and stale source hashes fail the closure acceptance.
UI_ALPHA_GATE may emit CLEARED_FOR_FOUNDER_ALPHA while founder_usability_pass=false, but must set point_b_complete=false and must not set verdict ALPHA_GATE_CLOSED.
Repairable failures require three same-tier attempts before tier expansion unless a non-repairable hard stop code is returned.
Each attempt receipt contains prior_lessons_read, receipts_read, local_code_truth_checked, what_changed_from_prior_attempt, and next_escalation_if_fail.
P0 improvement proposal generated from false-green or deploy-proof finding blocks scheduler healthy-idle unless resolved, parked_with_owner, or attached to an active BP delta.
Improvement loop output does not create or reference a secondary queue; it references BP_PRIORITY and Point B only.
Active machine files do not use amendment-era @ssot as primary product authority unless classified as law/history anchor; product-home, BP_PRIORITY, and POINT_B are the active chain.
Every npm script referenced by BuilderOS closure acceptance points at an existing script file, including builderos:alpha:confirm if retained.
FULLY_MACHINE_READY and SAME_TIER_CODER_DETERMINISM remain false unless all closure readiness receipts exist and pass.

The exact founder prompt 'can you tell me how many calories are in a twisted tea?' in /overlay/lifeos-app.html founder drawer must not route to fake display/overview and must return answer-like nutrition/search/uncertainty content.
Any final PASS for build probes includes commit_sha, origin/main proof, and explicit deploy/runtime state. PASS with 'Commit claimed; SHA not returned' fails.
All founder-specific corpus cases pass on the exact founder UI path before UI_ALPHA_GATE can be ok.
A fresh green UI_ALPHA_GATE receipt includes deploy_sha, corpus_version, and source receipt deploy_sha parity. Mtime freshness alone is not enough.
LifeRE path shows daily command center, top-3 priorities, and nightly debrief draft. If founder_usability_pass=false, UI says awaiting founder confirmation and does not say Alpha closed.
Closure acceptance fails if Railway /builder/ready deploy SHA does not match origin/main for live-required steps.

exit_criteria.pass: All ACT-S* static/unit/integration tests pass and all ACT-L* live tests pass when live env is available.
exit_criteria.blocked: If live env credentials are unavailable, static/unit tests may pass but closure receipt must be BLOCKED_LIVE_PROOF_MISSING, not PASS.
forbidden_pass_conditions: TECHNICAL_PASS used as Point B closure
PASS without commit_sha for code-changing build/repair
PASS while deploy_required and deploy_sha does not match origin/main
UI alpha ok without founder-specific corpus pass
FULLY_MACHINE_READY true before same-tier determinism and founder UI proof
